g.text: not recovered from one overhead camera.
socket centre XY in robot base frame
Apply servo gain → refine socket XY
Servo toward socket XY at standoff (≈5 cm above top)
EMA tracks Fz ONLY in free space
every contact phase as the reference.
Lower equilibrium one step, read Fz
while pressing gently below contact plane
Lift toward standoff (5 cm above socket)
workspace AABB clamp → per-cycle step clamp → force abort (Fz/F caps).
A force-cap breach aborts the run and holds position at any phase.
